title: parosela neomexicana
intro: Parosela neomexicana, also known as New Mexico parosela, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States. This plant is a member of the mint family and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine. The medicinal properties of Parosela neomexicana include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to promote relaxation, soothe sore throats, and provide relief from respiratory problems.
